title: Evidence Variety Showcase
summary: An Ashfall training archive built to demonstrate every supported evidence family in one staged package.

evidence.title: Archive Brief
evidence.summary: A top-line training summary for the showcase package.

evidence.title: Chain of Custody
evidence.summary: A templated intake form that tracks how the archive materials moved between handlers.

evidence.title: Access Log
evidence.summary: A structured log of archive-room entry badges.

evidence.title: Archive Thread
evidence.summary: A short handler exchange about which annex materials deserve attention first.

evidence.title: Portrait Card
evidence.summary: A portrait-style archive card for the annex custodian.

evidence.title: Scene Board
evidence.summary: A still image of the annotated evidence board used during training.

evidence.title: Handler Voicemail
evidence.summary: A short voice note that introduces the mixed-media annex.

evidence.title: Archive Floorplan
evidence.summary: A structured floorplan for the annex layout.

evidence.title: Directory Snapshot
evidence.summary: A cached intranet directory used to cross-reference the annex services.

stages.title: Core Archive
stages.summary: Review the text, record, thread, and photo artifacts that frame the training package.
handlerPrompts: Start with the archive brief, then compare the record and thread entries.
Use the portrait and scene still to see how the photo family changes the presentation.

objectives.prompt: Should the trainee continue to the mixed-media annex?

stages.title: Mixed-Media Annex
stages.summary: Review the audio, diagram, and webpage evidence families.
handlerPrompts: Listen to the voicemail, then compare it to the floorplan and directory snapshot.

objectives.prompt: Which evidence families are introduced in the annex stage?
